checks.message: AppArmor launch-proof lane now performs real profile-load / aa-exec capability gating and fails closed with an explicit kernel-capability reason when live enforcement is unavailable

detail.note: Host is not AppArmor-capable for live enforcement; lane now fails closed with explicit reason.

checks.message: AppArmor live-proof transport pack now exists as a self-verifying host bundle with hashed policy artifacts, standalone verifier, and runnable host execution script

AppArmor host-proof intake and attestation lane now imports a manifest-bound host execution report, verifies it against the pack expectations, signs an attestation, and renders a trust surface for replay/procurement carry-forward

assertions: aa-exec launches node under the generated profile

executedAssertions: aa-exec launches node under the generated profile

notes.purpose: local attestation smoke for remote AppArmor host-proof intake

checks.message: delegated-controller planner now resolves v1/v2-aware delegated controller paths and emits concrete quota / attachment commands for cpu, memory, and pids controllers

delegatedPlan.name: skq-del-section45-delegated-controller-proof-1e12183eb640
delegatedPlan.prelude: mkdir -p /sys/fs/cgroup/cpu/skq-del-section45-delegated-controller-proof-1e12183eb640; mkdir -p /sys/fs/cgroup/memory/skq-del-section45-delegated-controller-proof-1e12183eb640; mkdir -p /sys/fs/cgroup/pids/skq-del-section45-delegated-controller-proof-1e12183eb640; printf '%s' 100000 > /sys/fs/cgroup/cpu/skq-del-section45-delegated-controller-proof-1e12183eb640/cpu.cfs_period_us; printf '%s' 40000 > /sys/fs/cgroup/cpu/skq-del-section45-delegated-controller-proof-1e12183eb640/cpu.cfs_quota_us; printf '%s' 100663296 > /sys/fs/cgroup/memory/skq-del-section45-delegated-controller-proof-1e12183eb640/memory.limit_in_bytes; printf '%s' 24 > /sys/fs/cgroup/pids/skq-del-section45-delegated-controller-proof-1e12183eb640/pids.max; printf '%s' "$$" > /sys/fs/cgroup/cpu/skq-del-section45-delegated-controller-proof-1e12183eb640/cgroup.procs; printf '%s' "$$" > /sys/fs/cgroup/memory/skq-del-section45-delegated-controller-proof-1e12183eb640/cgroup.procs; printf '%s' "$$" > /sys/fs/cgroup/pids/skq-del-section45-delegated-controller-proof-1e12183eb640/cgroup.procs

checks.message: delegated-controller live kill-path lane now attaches a real child workload to the delegated controller group, verifies membership, terminates the group through the kernel controller path, and cleans the delegated group back down
